# Airframe Technical Note: gimbal stabilisation technology

**Attendees:** Aisha Mbeki, Sam Dreher, Lena Okafor, Dev Patel

## Summary

This page covers the gimbal stabilisation technology for the Airframe subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.
